creator: freebsd@alistairphipps.com
text:
Certain files on my zfs pool imported from Solaris cause a kernel panic when accessed, even just listing a directory.  The console says "panic: zfs_fuid_map_id".  I believe this issue is http://bugs.opensolaris.org/view_bug.do?bug_id=6746456 -- can this fix go into freebsd?

Fix: 

http://bugs.opensolaris.org/view_bug.do?bug_id=6746456 -- not sure how to find source change for this
How-To-Repeat: With my zpool, I can reproduce the panic all the time by accessing a particular directory.  It also occurs when running a scrub.
